query: SELECT sheet_name, product_name, buy_name, partner_buy_price, partner_sell_price, nfr_partner_price, product_code, product_type FROM sasboss_pricebook_items WHERE sheet_name IN ('UCaaS','Managed Voice','Managed Voice - DID Hosting') ORDER BY sheet_name, product_name LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT sheet_name, product_name, buy_name, partner_buy_price, partner_sell_price, nfr_partner_price, product_code, product_type FROM sasboss_pricebook_items WHERE sheet_name IN ('UCaaS','Managed Voice','Managed Voice - DID Hosting') ORDER BY sheet_name, product_name LIMIT 15;
